diagrams.title: Sequential Access Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how sequential access reads records one by one from the beginning until the target record is found
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how records are accessed in order and time complexity O(n)

diagrams.title: Direct Access Flow
diagrams.description: Shows how direct access uses seek operation to jump directly to any record using its block number
diagrams.purpose: Understanding O(1) random access using physical addresses

diagrams.title: ISAM Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the three components of ISAM: data file (sequentially organized), index file (key-pointer pairs), and overflow area
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how indexed access combines sequential storage with fast lookup

diagrams.title: Relative Access Calculation
diagrams.description: Demonstrates the formula for calculating byte offset from relative record number
elements: Result: Record 5 starts at byte offset 400
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how relative access computes storage addresses
